memories.value: First run. Discover all properties and their active channel listings. Establish baseline sync status across all platforms. Check for any existing calendar conflicts.

Airbnb iCal sync has 15-30 minute propagation delay. Superhost requirements: 90% response rate, <1% cancellation rate, 4.8+ overall rating, 10+ stays/year. Instant Book listings rank higher in search. Photo minimum: 5, recommended: 20+.

VRBO Premiere Partner requirements: accept instant booking, competitive pricing, high response rate, quality photos. VRBO skews toward families and larger groups. Property descriptions should emphasize space, safety features, and proximity to family attractions.

Lodgify is a direct booking website builder — sync focuses on availability and rate parity with OTA channels. Direct bookings save 15-20% in platform fees. SEO optimization matters for direct booking visibility.

Facebook Marketplace listings expire and need re-posting every 7-14 days. Informal tone performs better. Price must be prominently displayed. Engagement (likes, comments, shares) drives visibility in the algorithm.
No sync history recorded yet. Will track: sync success/failure timestamps per channel per property, conflict detection history, listing health score trends.
